constraints.name: blockNoItems
constraints.messageTemplate: Cannot approve purchase order '{poNumber}' with no items

constraints.name: warnCancelOrdered
constraints.messageTemplate: Cancelling ordered purchase order '{poNumber}' - vendor may need notification

value.value: Can only mark approved orders as ordered
Can only receive ordered or partially received orders
Can only update totals on draft orders
Cannot remove item that has been partially received

policies.name: ManagersCanCreatePO
policies.message: Only managers can create purchase orders

policies.name: ManagersCanSubmitPO
policies.message: Leads and managers can submit purchase orders

policies.message: Only managers can approve purchase orders

policies.name: ManagersCanCancelPO
policies.message: Only managers can cancel purchase orders
